# HTMD

> A Python platform for preparing, running, and analysing molecular dynamics simulations. HTMD builds simulation-ready systems under AMBER / CHARMM / OpenMM (including non-canonical residues, crosslinked/cyclic peptides, and membranes), drives MD through adaptive sampling, and turns trajectories into Markov state models with kinetics. Most workflows start from a single import, `from htmd.ui import *`.

## Getting started

- [Installation](installation.md): pip (`acellera-htmd`) or conda; optional licence registration.

## Tutorials

- [Tutorials index](tutorials/index.md): step-by-step lessons from a structure to a Markov model.
- [System building](tutorials/system-prep/index.md): eight end-to-end builds (protein, protein-ligand under AMBER and OpenFF, stapled/cyclic/bicyclic peptides, membrane, protein-RNA).
- [Running MD](tutorials/simulation/index.md): equilibration and production with the ACEMD engine.
- [MSM analysis](tutorials/analysis/index.md): trypsin/benzamidine binding and villin folding, full simlist -> projection -> clustering -> model -> kinetics pipeline.
- [Adaptive sampling](tutorials/adaptive/index.md): multi-epoch campaigns seeded from an on-the-fly MSM.

## How-to guides

- [How-to index](how-to/index.md): task-focused recipes.
- [Configure adaptive sampling](how-to/adaptive-configure.md) and [write a goal function](how-to/adaptive-goal-function.md).
- [System build with custom force fields / bonds](how-to/system-build-custom-forcefield.md), [AMBER + OpenFF ligands](how-to/system-build-amber-openff.md).
- [Membrane: asymmetric bilayer](how-to/membrane-asymmetric-bilayer.md), [embed in a pre-equilibrated membrane](how-to/membrane-embed-preequilibrated.md).
- MSM recipes: [plot the FES](how-to/msm-plot-fes.md), [interpret the ITS plot](how-to/msm-interpret-its-plot.md), [bootstrap errors](how-to/msm-bootstrap-errors.md), [extract state structures](how-to/msm-extract-state-structures.md).

## Explanation

- [The MSM analysis workflow](explanation/msm-workflow.md): the fixed five-step SimList -> Projection -> dimensionality reduction -> Clustering -> Model -> Kinetics pipeline.
- [System building](explanation/system-building.md): the canonical build pipeline and the cases beyond canonical proteins.
- [Adaptive sampling](explanation/adaptive-sampling.md): the rationale behind MSM-seeded multi-epoch sampling.
- [HTMD vs moleculekit](explanation/htmd-vs-moleculekit.md): how the two libraries divide responsibilities.

## Reference

- [API index by topic](reference/index.md): autogenerated module docs grouped by entry points / system building / membranes / adaptive / projections / clustering / MSM / docking.

## Key entry points

- `htmd.ui`: the umbrella import (`from htmd.ui import *`) that re-exports the symbols below.
- `htmd.simlist.simlist`: enumerate trajectory directories + topologies into a list of `Sim` objects.
- `htmd.adaptive.adaptiverun.AdaptiveMD`: the standard adaptive-sampling protocol (`AdaptiveGoal` and `AdaptiveBandit` extend it).
- `htmd.model.Model`: build and analyse a Markov state model.

## Full corpus

- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): concatenation of every doc page, generated at build time. Single-URL ingestion for retrieval pipelines.
